fire.name: Fire Emergency
steps: Activate the nearest fire alarm
Evacuate immediately using stairs (not elevators)
Close doors behind you to contain the fire
Assemble at the designated meeting point (football field)
Call Campus Security: 484-365-8139
Account for all students and staff
doNot: Re-enter building until cleared by authorities

lockdown.name: Lockdown Procedure
steps: Lock all doors and windows immediately
Turn off lights and close blinds
Move students out of sight lines from windows
Silence all electronic devices
Stay quiet and wait for official all-clear
Do NOT open doors for anyone until confirmed by authorities

medical.name: Medical Emergency
steps: Call 911 for life-threatening emergencies
Call Health Services: 484-365-6196
Do NOT move the person unless they're in immediate danger
Check for responsiveness and breathing
Provide first aid only if properly trained
Clear the area and wait for medical professionals

weather.name: Severe Weather
steps: Move to interior rooms or basement immediately
Stay away from windows, skylights, and glass doors
Take shelter in a small interior room or hallway
Monitor official announcements via emergency alerts
Wait for all-clear before leaving shelter
Avoid using elevators during power outages
